summary: All 15 tests passed for admin re-fulfill, account lookup/merge, and audio access features. Key verified: (1) POST /api/payments/admin/refulfill/{order_number} creates download links for paid orders, revokes old links, grants audio access for Holiday/4C products. (2) GET /api/payments/admin/accounts/lookup/{email} returns account info, transactions, download links, and audio access. (3) POST /api/payments/admin/accounts/merge correctly reports 'no duplicates' for single accounts. (4) GET /api/audio/access/{email} returns audio access after re-fulfillment. (5) Bundle starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae correctly expands to holiday_ae AND breakfast_ae_digital.
critical_code_review_comments: payment_routes.py lines 2582-2643: _grant_audio_access_for_items() correctly grants Holiday audio access (series_access=['holiday'], lessons_access=['covenant','cradle','cross','comforter']) for Holiday/4C purchases

payment_routes.py lines 2649-2741: admin_refulfill_order() correctly: (1) requires admin auth, (2) returns 404 for non-existent orders, (3) returns 400 for unpaid orders, (4) revokes old download links before creating new ones, (5) creates download links using resolve_item_to_file_entries(), (6) grants audio access via _grant_audio_access_for_items()
payment_routes.py lines 2748-2808: admin_lookup_accounts() returns comprehensive account info including accounts, transactions, download_links_count, active_links, and audio_access
payment_routes.py lines 2811-2869: admin_merge_accounts() correctly handles single account case (returns 'No duplicates found' message)
payment_routes.py lines 514-522: BUNDLE_EXPANSIONS correctly maps starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae to ['holiday_ae', 'breakfast_ae_digital']
seed_data_creation: None - used existing paid order SF-2026-P7DXY
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin re-fulfill, account lookup/merge, and audio access features fully tested. Key verified behaviors: (1) Refulfill endpoint creates 5 download links for order SF-2026-P7DXY with 8 items. (2) Audio access granted: series_access=['holiday'], lessons_access=['covenant','cradle','cross','comforter']. (3) Account lookup shows 14 transactions, 36 download links (6 active). (4) Bundle expansion works: starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae -> holiday_ae + breakfast_ae_digital. (5) Re-fulfill twice creates new tokens (old ones revoked).

refulfill_creates_downloads.details: Order SF-2026-P7DXY: 8 items processed, 5 downloads created, 0 failed

refulfill_revokes_old_links.details: Re-fulfilling twice creates all new tokens (old ones revoked)

lookup_returns_account_info.details: Returns accounts, transactions, download_links_count, active_links, audio_access

lookup_unknown_email.details: Unknown email returns account_count=0, has_duplicates=false, transactions=[]

merge_no_duplicates.details: Returns 'No duplicates found for overflowharvest@gmail.com' for single account

merge_requires_email.details: Returns 400 when email not provided in request body

audio_access_after_refulfill.details: After refulfill, overflowharvest@gmail.com has holiday series access with all 4 lessons

bundle_expansion.details: starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae expands to holiday_ae AND breakfast_ae_digital (2 entries)

mocked_apis.none: All tests use live endpoints - no mocking
